name: lifeline
title: Lifeline
description: An interactive timeline of a life — horizontal on desktop, vertical on mobile, with floating photo cards, hover media, a tap-to-expand lightbox, and a cinematic intro.

files.content:
export { Lifeline } from "./lifeline"
export { LifelineMarkerColumn } from "./lifeline-marker"
export { useLifelineScroll } from "./use-lifeline-scroll"
export { CompanyIcon } from "./company-icon"
export { LifelineLegend } from "./lifeline-legend"
export type { CompanyIconId } from "./company-icon"

export type {
  LifelineCompany,
  LifelineEvent,
  LifelineEventSegment,
  LifelineLegendItem,
  LifelineMarker,
  LifelineMetPerson,
  LifelineMentor,
  LifelinePhoto,
  LifelineProps,
} from "./types"

export const LIFELINE_LABEL_COLUMN_WIDTH = 56 export const LIFELINE_LABEL_GAP = 16 export const LIFELINE_STICKY_SHIELD_WIDTH = LIFELINE_LABEL_COLUMN_WIDTH + LIFELINE_LABEL_GAP export const LIFELINE_STICKY_LEFT = 20 export function LifelineStickyLabels() { return (

Age

Years

) }
export const LIFELINE_MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 768
